'''gachuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okey|okey]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okey|okey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gachuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gæchizhith || gæchizhij || gæchizhish || gæchizhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gachuchuzhuth || gachuchuzhuj || gachuchuzhush || gachuchuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gachuzhuth || gachuzhuj || gachuzhush || gachuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gachufzhufth || gachufzhufj || gachufzhufsh || gachufzhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gachuzhuthu || gachuzhuju || gachuzhushu || gachuzhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || gachuzhuth || gachuzhuj || gachuzhush || gachuzhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gachuzhuthul || gachuzhujul || gachuzhushul || gachuzhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gachuzhuuthuthu || gachuzhuujuju || gachuzhuushushu || gachuzhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || gachuzhuthun || gachuzhujun || gachuzhushun || gachuzhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gachuzhuthuoro || gachuzhujuoro || gachuzhushuoro || gachuzhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
